Data-driven reports and power maps from FP Analytics

Semiconductors and the U.S.-China Tech Race
            Special Report: Examines semiconductors’ key role in U.S-China strategic and economic competitiveness, critical risks to global supply chains, and the central role of Taiwan in global tech competition.

The Future of Money
            Power Map: In this 3-part series, Part I assesses emerging threats to U.S. dollar supremacy, Part II examines cryptocurrencies as vehicles for financial change, and Part III addresses institutional adoption and the rapidly evolving regulatory landscape.

Climate & Systemic Risk
            Special Report: Explores the financial sector’s role in managing climate-related risks to the global economy and accelerating the transition to net-zero.

Ones and Tooze
							Two data points that explain the world: Foreign Policy’s weekly economics podcast with Adam Tooze.

The Catch
							Foreign Policy’s new six-part narrative series on global fishing: How squid explains the state of our oceans.

I Spy
							Spies don’t talk—it’s the cardinal rule of the business. But here on I Spy, we get them to open up.
